title: XCE Research-Based Refinement
trigger_phrases: 027 pt-03 memory backend causal graph xce
description: Phase parent for the XCE adoption work. Pass 1 research complete (10 iterations + synthesis, 2026-05-08), pt-02 cross-validation amendments applied (10 IRQs, 2026-05-09), pt-03 scope-expansion research complete (10 iterations, gpt-5.5 high fast, 2026-05-09), and 5 net-new L3 phase children scaffolded from pt-03 recommendations (2026-05-09). Total 10 phase children now scaffolded: 001 HLD/LLD (L2), 002 trace (L2), 003 impact analysis (L2), 004 first-action mandate (L1), 005 adoption eval (L3) — all from pt-01/pt-02; 006 coco intent steering (L3), 007 memory semantic triggers (L3), 008 feedback reducers + 3 P0 fixes (L3), 009 retrieval rerank clients (L3), 010 coco+memory context extras (L3) — all from pt-03. Phases 006-010 each have 9 files including resource-map.md per user directive. Pt-03 verdict: bounded ADAPT throughout, default-off / shadow-first, no SaaS, no embedding swaps. P0 fixes inside Phase 008 Sub-Phase 1 are correctness preconditions for Sub-Phases 4 (Consumer B) and 5 (Consumer C).
